title: 🔥偏离拟合价55.8%，矿工投降倒逼底部
body: 市场处于“矿工投降”驱动的加速探底阶段。BTC 跌至 $66,168，核心在于偏离拟合价格 $149,737 高达 -55.8%，估值偏离度刷新本轮极值。价格同时偏离 200日成本 $91,306 达 -27.5%，长期筹码深度套牢。MVRV 仅 1.22，低于历史 80% 的时间，盈利盘彻底枯竭。矿企成本倒挂引发的被动抛售是当前主跌浪源头。这轮投降式出清还要持续多久？
title_en: 🔥 Off by 55.8% from Fit Price, Miners Surrender Driving Bottom
body_en: The market is in an accelerated bottoming phase driven by "miner surrender." BTC has dropped to $66,168, with the core issue being a significant -55.8% deviation from the fit price of $149,737,刷新本轮极值。The price also deviates from the 200-day cost of $91,306 by -27.5%, indicating deep long-term holding losses. The MVRV stands at just 1.22, lower than 80% of historical time, with profitable positions completely exhausted. The passive selling caused by the cost inversion of mining companies is the source of the current main selling wave. How long will this surrender-style clearing last?
